title: [100 Count] 6 Inch Bamboo Skewers for Kabob, Grilling, Fruits, Appetizers, and Cocktails…
features: Comfy Package 6" bamboo skewer is the ideal addition to any establishment grilling satay, mixed shish kabobs, vegetables or fresh fruit!

6 Inch Length - You'll have no trouble fitting all of your favorite veggies on this 6" long skewer. It's the perfect size for creating tantalizing kabobs and sturdy enough that you won't have to worry about losing any ingredients.
Eco-Friendly - Made from biodegradable bamboo, this skewer sticks are a more eco-conscious alternative to skewers made of other types of wood or plastic.
Sharp Point - With an extra sharp point that quickly and easily pierces food, these wooden skewers makes assembling kebabs an easy task.
Grill & Oven Safe - These skewers are safe for the grill or oven!
description: The Comfy Package 6" bamboo skewer is the ideal addition to any establishment grilling satay, mixed shish kabobs, or fresh vegetables! You can even use it to skewer fresh fruit for fruit kabobs. Skewers allow you to choose the ingredients and create a masterpiece that's fun to look at and delicious to eat. The possibilities are endless!
